description: Workbook 2 — Maps technical variables into legal clauses, manages contract lifecycle from draft to execution

cells.I: The master boilerplate containing IMHO GEN's standard legal clauses
The first project-specific iteration combining the D2.1 boilerplate with the abstracted D1.15 Project Brief scope and budget.
Internal routing document for the Project Manager to verify operational timelines and technical deliverables are accurately captured.
Internal routing document for Finance to verify payment schedules
Internal routing for final executive risk assessment (Head of Ops / R&D) before external transmission.
Link to calender invite and meeting agenda
Internal memo for requesting a review of the assessment made
The fully signed, legally binding document complete with signature timestamps and digital audit certificates.
The formal internal trigger alerting Engineering and Finance that the contract is active
The central dashboard tracking the real-time status of all active contract drafts and execution timelines
This handles the "Native File" IP and Liability Waiver.

cells.M: Description of Primary activities of Organizaiton

cells.A: 2.0 STANDARD LEGAL CLAUSES (Base Text for Copying to D2.2)

cells.H: Standard Clause Text (Do not alter without executive approval)
This Engineering Services Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into by and between IMHOGEN LTD ("Service Provider") and [Client Name] ("Client").
IMHOGEN agrees to provide the engineering
Client agrees to pay the total sum of [Total GHS] as follows: [X]% upon execution
IMHOGEN's total liability under this Agreement
Either party may terminate this agreement with 14 days written notice. Client remains legally liable for all engineering hours logged and materials purchased up to the date of termination.
Neither party shall be liable for delays caused by circumstances beyond their reasonable control
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Ghana. Disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration in Kumasi

cells.A: 3.0 STANDARD APPENDICES TO ATTACH (Required for D2.2)

cells.Q: IMHO GEN Standard Service Level Agreement (SLA)

cells.A: 2.0 CORE CONTRACT VARIABLES (The "Fill-in-the-Blanks" for D2.1 Boilerplate)

cells.H: Value / Input to map into Contract
[e.g. 40 Working Days from receipt of advance]

cells.A: 3.0 PROJECT-SPECIFIC LEGAL DIRECTIVES (Extracted from D1.16 Handoff)

cells.H: Specific Clause Added to Draft Contract
[e.g. "It is explicitly agreed that regulatory certification (CE/UL) is the sole responsibility of the Client and falls entirely outside the scope of IMHO GEN's deliverables."]
[e.g. "Phase 2 fabrication timelines shall remain paused until formal,written approval of the 3D CAD design is received from the Client."],[e.g. Section 4.1]
[e.g. "Due to volatile raw material markets,[e.g. Section 3.4]

cells.B: Appendix A: D1.15 Project Brief & Draft Budget
Appendix B: D1.13 Scope of Work (Exclusions)
Appendix C: IMHO GEN Standard SLA

cells.I: IMHOGEN retains Native CAD; Client gets PDF/STEP
Client buys Native Source Files (CAD Assets)

cells.A: The Client acknowledges that IMHOGEN is modeling based on PROVIDED DATA.
IMHOGEN is not responsible for fitment issues arising from inaccuracies in the client's original source model or measurements.

cells.B: [e.g. Client must sign off on CAD before Fab]

cells.E: [Proceed to Finance Review (D2.4) / Return to Contract Admin for Edits]

cells.B: Currency and Tax (e.g. VAT/WHT) clearly stated?
Advance Payment (e.g. 40% to cover design/initial BOM)
Invoice payment terms (e.g. Net 21 Days) stated?
Quote Validity Period (e.g. 21 days due to material pricing)
Termination Liability (Client pays for hours/BOM if cancelled)

cells.E: [Proceed to Executive Review (D2.5) / Return to Contract Admin for Edits]

cells.A: D2.5 EXECUTIVE REVIEW DRAFT (Final Risk & Authorization)

cells.B: PM Operational Approval (D2.3) complete and attached?
Finance Commercial Approval (D2.4) complete and attached?
All requested edits from PM and Finance applied to current draft?

cells.H: Are the engineering boundaries and exclusions tight enough to prevent scope creep?
Does the timeline allow sufficient buffer for Kumasi supply chain delays?
Does the payment schedule protect IMHO GEN from out-of-pocket fabrication costs?
Are IMHO GEN's background IP and native CAD files adequately protected?

cells.A: Does this project align with IMHO GEN's long-term strategic objectives for 2026?

cells.F: [Type a brief justification. e.g. "While margins are tightthis project establishes a critical foothold in the agricultural processing sector."]

cells.E: [APPROVED FOR CLIENT TRANSMISSION / REJECTED / HOLD FOR REVISION]
[Proceed to D2.6 (Lock Draft) and D2.7 (Client Transmittal)]

cells.N: [e.g. Absolute minimum 35% to cover initial BOM]
[e.g. Cannot compress below 35 Days due to workshop load]
[e.g. Maximum 60 Days; no extended warranties without fee]

cells.A: Has the D2.2 Google Doc been exported as a static,non-editable PDF?
Is the locked PDF named according to standard convention (e.g. IMHO_Contract_V1_ClientName)?
Is the locked PDF saved in the permanent client folder?
Baseline Locked and Ready for Transmittal (D2.7)?:

cells.D: IMHO GEN Engineering Services Agreement - [Project Name]
[Exact file name of PDF from D2.6]

cells.A: Following our discussions and the approved Project Brief, please find attached the Draft Engineering Services Agreement for [Project Name].

This document outlines the formal technical scope, and payment schedules we have agreed upon. We encourage you and your legal team to review the terms carefully. Due to current fluctuations in material supply chains
If the terms meet your expectations,we are happy to schedule a brief alignment meeting.
We look forward to officially kicking off this phase of engineering.

cells.E: [Briefly summarize what the client wants to change based on their email reply. e.g.
[Review D2.6 Sec 2.0. e.g., We can compress to 35 days max, but absolutely NO discount on the advance payment.]

cells.A: 3.0 STANDARD MEETING INVITE SCRIPT (Copy & Paste to Client)
Thank you for reviewing the Draft Engineering Services Agreement for [Project Name]. We appreciate your feedback regarding [Insert 1-2 words on their concern,e.g.,the delivery timeline].

To ensure we are perfectly aligned and to finalize the terms efficiently, we would like to schedule a brief 30-minute Contract Alignment Meeting with our Lead Project Manager and Engineering Director.
Please let us know if [Proposed Date & Time] works for your team. Our proposed agenda is as follows:
1. Review of requested amendments to the Draft Contract.
3. Finalizing terms for the Pending Signature Draft.
We look forward to a productive discussion.
D2.9 NEGOTIATION MEETING NOTES (Live Capture & Resolution)

cells.T: [e.g. Agreed to 5% discount (GHS 164,825) IF they increase advance payment to 50%]
[e.g. IMHOGEN held firm at 35 days. Client accepted.]

cells.H: [e.g. Client wants native CAD files included]
cells.T: [e.g. Agreed to release CAD files for a separate GHS 5,000 buyout fee]

cells.A: [e.g. Client's legal team needs to review our IP buyout clause wording]

cells.E: [TERMS AGREED - PROCEED TO D2.10 / DEADLOCK - ESCALATE / CLIENT WITHDRAWN]
[e.g. Contract Admin to apply the 5% discount and IP buyout clause to the finalized contract.]

cells.N: [e.g. "Client retains option to purchase native CAD for GHS 5000"

cells.A: 3.0 FINANCIAL RE-VERIFICATION (If pricing changed during negotiation)
Has the new pricing structure been verified to ensure minimum overhead recovery?
Has the D2.10 Google Doc been exported as the FINAL static PDF?
Is the locked PDF named according to standard convention (e.g. IMHO_FinalContract_ClientName)?
Contract finalized and ready for signature routing (D2.11)?:
Thank you for a highly productive alignment meeting. We have updated the Engineering Services Agreement to reflect the exact terms we agreed upon.
Please find the finalized contract attached for your signature. [If using DocuSign: "You can click the link below to review and sign the document digitally."]
Once executed by both parties,our Finance team will issue the invoice for the advance payment,and our Engineering team will formally initiate Phase 1.
We are excited to begin this development journey with you.
Has the contract been pending signature for more than 7 days?
D2.12 EXECUTED CONTRACT & AUDIT TRAIL (Legal Record)
Has the executed contract been emailed to the Finance Department?
Has Finance generated and issued the Advance Payment Invoice?
Is the contract fully executed and the first invoice sent?
Are all documents present in the secure cloud vault?
D2.14 PHASE INITIATION NOTICE (Engineering Green Light)
Date Payment Cleared IMHO GEN Bank Account:
Link to Executed Contract (For PM reference):
Has the central tracking database been updated to "Active Engineering Phase"?
Has the Project Manager formally received this Initiation Notice?
Is the Engineering Team officially authorized to begin billable work?
2.0 RECENTLY EXECUTED & CLEARED CONTRACTS (Ready for Engineering)
